query:
SELECT
                model as "name!",
                COUNT(DISTINCT context_id)::bigint as "conversations!",
                COUNT(*)::bigint as "ai_requests!"
            FROM ai_requests
            WHERE created_at >= $1 AND created_at < $2
              AND user_id = $3
              AND context_id IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY model
            ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT context_id) DESC
            LIMIT $4
